'''''Bentor''''' was a [[Muurian transport]]. ''Bentor'' was just about to enter the hangar of [[Corvalis]] when the incident between the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and the [[Hurrim]] took place.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''

[[Category:Muurian transports]]
